concerns.text: FR-002 requires three distinct synthetic degradation modes (downscale, cloud mask, temporal shifts). Tasks T014 and T015 cover downscaling and cloud masks, but no task exists to implement the 'temporal shifts' degradation mode. This leaves FR-002 unimplemented.

FR-003 and SC-001 require an end-to-end pipeline that generates baseline 3DGS scenes AND applies inpainting to measure improvement. Tasks T021 (baseline) and T022 (inpainting) are split without a task explicitly orchestrating the full 'degraded input → baseline → inpainted output' flow required to compute the recovery rate.

FR-005 and SC-002 require a sensitivity analysis sweeping the Normalized Noise Fraction (NNF) to find a critical threshold. No task exists to generate the input dataset where NNF is systematically varied across samples; current tasks only analyze static degradation levels from Phase 3.

SC-003 requires measuring computational feasibility (peak RAM and wall-clock time) against specific constraints (6.5 GB, 45 mins). No task implements the instrumentation to capture and log these specific metrics per scene; T023 handles OOM errors but does not record the performance data required for the success criterion.

FR-001 requires ensuring spatial alignment error is < 2 meters and excluding samples that fail. Task T005 implements the transform logic, but no task explicitly implements the verification logic and automated exclusion of samples failing the < 2m threshold.

Task T011b acquires real cloud masks for FR-006 validation but does not specify the fallback path defined in the spec (switch to real masks if similarity < 0.8), leaving the implementation of the edge case undefined in the task list.
